docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,300.00 FILED BY CHIU, KUNG-KAY AS TO DEFENDANT TUNG, KALUNG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNCLAIMED - RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TUNG, KALUNG
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIU, KUNG-KAY AS TO DEFENDANT TUNG, KALUNG
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIU, KUNG-KAY AS TO DEFENDANT TUNG, KALUNG

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-28-2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, AND NO PROOF OF SERVICE. AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, THE COURT ORDERED THE MATTER CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-16-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELLE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
